design_philosophy.theme: The Deep Blue & The Crisp White
design_philosophy.concept: A visual journey from the deep ocean to the pristine plate. High contrast, wet textures, and premium whitespace.

usage_rules.headings: Use Playfair Display for all H1-H3. Bold (700) for H1, Semibold (600) for H2. Tracking-tight.
usage_rules.body: Use Manrope for all paragraphs. Leading-relaxed. Text-slate-600 for body, Text-slate-900 for bold labels.
usage_rules.accent: Use Cinzel for small overlines (e.g., 'EST 2022', 'FRESH CATCH') in uppercase with tracking-widest.

usage.backgrounds: Mainly white (#ffffff) or very light slate (#f8fafc). Use Dark Ocean (#0f172a) for Footer and Hero text overlay.
usage.text: Never pure black. Use #1e293b for headings, #475569 for body.
usage.cta: Primary buttons: Dark Ocean (#0f172a). Secondary/Accent elements: Aqua (#2dd4bf).

strategies.name: The Archipelago
strategies.description: Islands of content (cards) floating in negative space. Avoid wall-to-wall text.

strategies.name: The Tides
strategies.description: Asymmetrical layout for Hero and About. Image left/Text right, then swap. Use overlapping elements with z-index.

textures.water_overlay: Use a subtle SVG noise filter or water caustic PNG overlay at 5% opacity on blue backgrounds.

effects.parallax: CSS-based parallax. Use 'perspective' on container and 'translateZ' on children.

Button.style: Pill-shaped or rounded-md. Primary: Dark Blue bg, White text, hover:scale-105 transition-transform. Accent: Aqua text, underline hover.
Button.classes: rounded-full font-medium tracking-wide shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300

Card.style: White bg, soft blue shadow. Hover: lift up (-5px).
Card.classes: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.12)] transition-all duration-300 group overflow-hidden

Navbar.style: Glassmorphism. Sticky top. Logo left, Links center, WhatsApp CTA right.
Navbar.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/20

media.image_rules: All images must have 'object-cover'. Add a subtle gradient overlay (black/10 to transparent) on hero images to ensure text readability.

rules: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
Use semantic HTML (header, main, section, footer).
All images must have alt text.
Interactive elements must have focus states (ring-2 ring-accent).

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use simple gradients; use textured or layered backgrounds.
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Setup global CSS imports for fonts (Playfair Display, Manrope).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update tailwind.config.js with the new color palette and font families.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create the reusable UI components (Button, Card, SectionWrapper).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement the specific sections in order: Hero, About, Services, Why Us, Occasions, Testimonials, FAQ, Contact, Footer.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Ensure the WhatsApp floating button is visible on all pages (z-50).
instructions_to_main_agent.special_note: Implement the '3D Tilt' effect on the Services cards using CSS transform on hover.
